Motion For Order Determinming That Action Not Stayed By Deft
Off Calendar Oct-17-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Order Determinming That Action Not Stayed By Defendant.
APPEARANCES: Maxwell S. Peltz., Esq., 415-551-9549, Asst. District Attorney for Plaintiff and Moving Party. No other appearance in the matter.
RULING: The Courts vacates the tentative ruling and the matter is ordered off calendar. Upon resolution of bankcuptcy court, the Moving Party will re-notice the motion. Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
